LuxScaleAI - Uniformity (point-by-point IES grid)
Timestamp: 2026-03-31T01:14:08.795587
Room length (m): 50, width (m): 30, ceiling height (m): 5.0
Required lux: 5200.0, Standard Uo: 0.6
Work plane z = 0.75 m, grid 8x8, wall margin 3 m (same as fixture inset)

========================================================================
Option 1 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 100 w\BVP130 T25 1 xLED131-4S_830 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 13000.00 lm; IES file header: 13000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 880, phi_each_lm=14071.59, phi_total_lm=12383000.00

  E_avg (lx): 12717.477518
  E_max (lx): 14222.193740
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.677123
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.605483

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 2 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 100 w\BVP130 T25 1 xLED131-4S_830 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 13000.00 lm; IES file header: 13000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 798, phi_each_lm=15518.80, phi_total_lm=12384000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 8846.041242
  E_avg (lx): 12707.643051
  E_max (lx): 14253.434452
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.696120
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.620625

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 3 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 100 w\BVP130 T25 1 xLED131-4S_830 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 13000.00 lm; IES file header: 13000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 646, phi_each_lm=19195.05, phi_total_lm=12400000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 9250.597815
  E_avg (lx): 12731.011974
  E_max (lx): 14418.701881
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.726619
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.641569

========================================================================
Option 4 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 150 w\by698p+led265cw+wb+g2.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 26500.00 lm; IES file header: 26500.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 594, phi_each_lm=20871.21, phi_total_lm=12397500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 7171.881867
  E_avg (lx): 10056.400721
  E_max (lx): 11445.369463
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.713166
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.626619

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 5 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 150 w\by698p+led265cw+wb+g2.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 26500.00 lm; IES file header: 26500.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 527, phi_each_lm=23499.05, phi_total_lm=12384000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 7168.126363
  E_avg (lx): 10047.819061
  E_max (lx): 11430.262790
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.713401
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.627118

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 6 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 150 w\by698p+led265cw+wb+g2.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 26500.00 lm; IES file header: 26500.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 420, phi_each_lm=29500.00, phi_total_lm=12390000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 7178.686407
  E_avg (lx): 10058.989385
  E_max (lx): 11445.631920
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.713659
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.627199

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 7 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 400 w\BVP651 T45 1 xLED600-4S_757 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 60000.00 lm; IES file header: 60000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 448, phi_each_lm=27640.62, phi_total_lm=12383000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 6952.811626
  E_avg (lx): 10792.355737
  E_max (lx): 12330.965064
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.644235
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.563850

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 8 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 400 w\BVP651 T45 1 xLED600-4S_757 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 60000.00 lm; IES file header: 60000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 405, phi_each_lm=30577.78, phi_total_lm=12384000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 7143.400309
  E_avg (lx): 10890.413977
  E_max (lx): 12578.759006
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.655935
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.567894

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 9 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 400 w\BVP651 T45 1 xLED600-4S_757 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 60000.00 lm; IES file header: 60000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 312, phi_each_lm=39743.59, phi_total_lm=12400000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 7859.756559
  E_avg (lx): 11197.531168
  E_max (lx): 12369.221779
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.701919
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.635429

   8847.8805  11293.1978  11830.8658  12230.4610  11889.7743  11916.4104  12129.4561  10732.9575
   7859.7566  10070.6670  10518.4079  10887.3633  10570.1329  10593.9253  10853.2398   9717.6824

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 10 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC flood light exterior
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.6
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 150 w\BVP130 1 xLED210-4S_740 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 21000.00 lm; IES file header: 21000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=8, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=5.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 594, phi_each_lm=20871.21, phi_total_lm=12397500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 9418.713318
  E_avg (lx): 12759.497500
  E_max (lx): 14419.167758
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.738173
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.653208
